Cookie of the Week

This Week's Star

⭐ Cookie of the Week
Fan Favorite

The Oreo

A rich dark chocolate cookie topped with a generous swirl of cream cheese frosting and crowned with a classic Oreo. Perfectly balanced between deep cocoa and light, tangy frosting — cookies & cream in every bite. Once you try it, it's impossible to covet anything else.

🍫 Dark Chocolate 🧁 Cream Cheese Frosting Limited Weekly

What Is a Covet?

Not just a cookie. A craving worth chasing.

A Covet is a handcrafted dessert drop built to feel limited, personal, and memorable. Every flavor is made to be talked about, shared, and wanted again.

Small-Batch

Every drop is made in limited quantities so the lineup feels fresh, intentional, and worth ordering early.

Stacked Flavor

Covets are built with layers: cookie bases, fillings, frosting, toppings, and textures that make each bite feel complete.

Community Driven

Members vote in the Covet Vault, leave reviews, and help decide which flavors deserve a comeback.

Covet Lab

Where new cravings get tested.

Covet Lab is the test kitchen for experimental flavors, seasonal drops, customer ideas, and future weekly lineups.

Idea Drop

Customers suggest flavors and combinations that could become future Covets.

Prototype Bakes

New recipes are tested as limited drops before they become official menu items.

Vault Winners

Top-voted cookies from the Covet Vault can move into the next weekly lineup.

Covet Vault

Members vote. Everyone sees the results.

Create a free account to become a member, vote for the cookies you want back, and see public vote totals on each flavor.

Our Story

Born from a Love of Baking

Philip started Covet Cookies in middle school — not as a class project or a passing hobby, but because he genuinely loved the process: testing flavor combinations late into the evening, figuring out why one batch came out perfect and another fell flat, and watching people's faces when they took the first bite. What began as a kid baking in his family's kitchen has grown into a real weekly business with real customers, built one order, one batch, and one Saturday afternoon at a time.

Every cookie is still handcrafted by hand, in small batches, with the same care he put into his very first sale. No assembly lines, no shortcuts — just premium ingredients and an obsessive attention to texture and flavor that comes from someone who's spent years figuring out exactly what makes a cookie worth coveting.

But Covet Cookies has always been about more than cookies. It's where Philip learned to run a business: pricing, sourcing, customer service, showing up even when it's inconvenient. It's the foundation for a bigger goal — one day owning his own bakery and growing this into a brand recognized well beyond Coppell. This is the first step, not the destination, and Philip is just getting started.

🧁 Small-batch, handcrafted every week — never frozen, never mass-produced
✨ Premium ingredients: real butter, pure vanilla, quality chocolate
📱 Direct ordering via text — personal, easy, and always personal
